name: Peas with Cauliflower in Yogurt-Cumin Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and wash the peas.
2. Bring 2 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan.
3. Add the peas and cauliflower to the boiling water; cook for 7 minutes or until crisp-tender.
4. Drain well, then transfer the mixture to a bowl.
5. Add salt and toss well.
6. In a separate bowl, combine yogurt with cilantro, lemon juice, ground cumin, and white pepper; stir well.
7. Pour the sauce over the cauliflower mixture; gently toss to coat.
8. Makes 4 servings.
Per serving: Calories 83 (11% from fat) / Protein 6.4g / Fat 1g (Saturated 0.5g, Monounsaturated 0.2g, Polyunsaturated 0.2g) / Carbohydrate 13.9g / Fiber 3.8g / Cholesterol 3mg / Iron 1.4mg / Sodium 195mg / Calcium 12mg
